finding: A successful served-identity verifier row must be canonically bound to the exact deployment_url in the proof before deployment evidence can be marked observed.

cases: failed exact URL plus unrelated success rejected
failed deployment decision rejected despite exact verifier success
verification.runtime_limit: The execution environment could not resolve github.com for a fresh clone. Tests ran against locally reconstructed source logic from the committed GitHub contents, so this is source-behavior evidence rather than CI or deployment evidence.

privacy_boundary: No credentials, private chat, personal health material, diagnosis, or treatment claim was stored.
falsification_routes: Run the committed integration test in GitHub Actions or a fresh checkout.
Construct a proof whose successful verifier row names a different canonical URL and confirm claim_state remains unresolved.
Fetch the exact deployment URL after a real Pages deployment and rerun the served identity verifier.
limits: Exact URL binding does not prove Cloudflare account ownership.
Exact URL binding does not prove the deployed commit.
No live Cloudflare deployment occurred in this run.
A valid deployment evidence packet does not establish scientific truth.
